title: _conflict_ledger.json -- cross-source conflict ledger v0.1
description: One ledger per case, shared across every stage that can find the case's own sources disagreeing with each other. See harness-guardrails P6. Before any stage starts, the orchestrator checks whether any entry is pending (via the DAO's check_conflicts_clear query, not by reading this file directly) -- if so, it halts and lists every pending entry, old and new. A stage only proceeds once every entry is resolved or false_positive. Note: this ledger is for the case's OWN sources contradicting each other -- an insurer's claim disagreeing with case evidence (denial-validation, Phase 2) is a different kind of comparison and does not belong here.

raised_by_stage.description: Canonical stage name (same enum as _run_state.json's stage_name -- one vocabulary, one drift surface). e.g. consistency_check, claim_analysis

sources.description: Both (or all) disagreeing values, each attributed to its source. Never resolved by discarding an entry.

verdict.description: Every entry starts pending. Only a human sets resolved/false_positive.

resolution_note.description: Required when verdict is not pending -- what was decided and why.

then.comment: A resolved/false_positive entry MUST carry a non-empty resolution_note and a resolved_at -- the P6 audit trail. Prose-only before (fleet F7); a hand-edited or forked ledger could persist a resolution with no recorded reason.
